# Only modification: relic density value changed to 1.35e-01 (vs WS-1: 2.92e-01)
# to produce the required 14.4% rel-diff against micrOMEGAs fixture (0.118).
#
# Point A: m_chi=100 GeV, m_med=199 GeV (on-resonance), partner=105 GeV
# Scenario: produces CROSSCHECK_DISAGREEMENT with micrOMEGAs crosscheck.
#
# Seed values for verification:
#   SEED_Omegah2          = 1.35e-01  (patched from WS-1: 2.92e-01)
#   SEED_sigma_SI_proton  = 1.23e-45
#   SEED_sigma_SI_neutron = 1.20e-45
#   SEED_sigma_SD_proton  = 5.67e-42
#   SEED_sigma_SD_neutron = 5.50e-42
#   SEED_sigmav_total     = 2.34e-26

Omegah2                       = 1.35e-01
sigma_SI_proton               = 1.23e-45
sigma_SI_neutron              = 1.20e-45
sigma_SD_proton               = 5.67e-42
sigma_SD_neutron              = 5.50e-42
sigmav_total                  = 2.34e-26
%_chi1chi1_zz                 = 17.84 %
%_chi1chi1_ww                 = 12.30 %
